briefdescription.para: This function returns the version number of xilpki library.
This function reset the PKI module.
This function performs the PKI module soft reset.
This function performs the PKI module initialization.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPki instance

listitem.para: XPKI_ERROR_UNALIGN_ADDR - On Request/Completion queue Address are not Word aligned.

briefdescription.para: This function Generate key pairs for the ECC curves NIST-P192, P256, P384, and P521.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPki instance
Type of ECC curve(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)
Pointer to the pulic-key buffer
Pointer to the private-key buffer

briefdescription.para: This function performs ECC sign verify known answer test(KAT)

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPki instance
Type of ECC curve class either prime/binary curve and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function performs ECC sign generate known answer test(KAT)

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPki instance
Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function performs ECC pairwise consistency test on ECC Curves.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPki instance
Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)
ECC public key
ECC private key

briefdescription.para: This function is used to generate the Random number for the give size.

parameterdescription.para: Required Random Number length in bytes.
Pointer to store the Random Number.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to submit the crypto operation to the PKI Queue.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPki instance
Pointer to the queue info structure
Pointer to the RequestID. if the request is successfully submitted it filled with unique id

listitem.para: XPKI_UNSUPPORTED_OPS - If the requested operation is not supported.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to get the crypto operation results from the PKI Queue.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XPki instance
Pointer to the queue info structure
Unique request ID Filled by the XilPki_EnQueue() API.

listitem.para: XPKI_UNSUPPORTED_OPS - If the requested operation is not supported.

briefdescription.para: This function is used to disable access to the PKI Hardware.
This function returns ECC public key to perform KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function returns ECC expected signature to perform KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function returns ECC private key to perform KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function returns ECC ephemeral key to perform KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function returns ECC Data hash to perform KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: This function returns ECC Data length to perform KAT.

parameterdescription.para: Type of ECC curve class either prime or binary class and curve type(NIST-P192,P256,P384, and P521)

briefdescription.para: It is a callback API for Signature Verification Request.

parameterdescription.para: Unique ID for the submitted request
Status of the request

briefdescription.para: It is a callback API for Signature Generation Request.

parameterdescription.para: Unique ID for the submitted request
Status of the request

briefdescription.para: It is a completion callback API for Private-key generation Request.

parameterdescription.para: Unique ID for the submitted request
Status of the Request

briefdescription.para: It is a completion callback API for Public-key generation request.

parameterdescription.para: Unique ID for the submitted request
Status of the request

briefdescription.para: Failed to copy the signature into the user pointed buffer.
Failed to copy the private-key into the user pointed buffer.
Failed to copy the public-key into the user pointed buffer.
The XilPKI is a standalone library designed to run in bare-metal for the Keystone B device.

detaileddescription.para: This file contains the definitions of known answer test(KAT) functions.

This library provides the implementation of the interface functions for the PKI hardware module. Though the hardware supports many other security related operations, currently, this library provides interface for the following operations.

This library supports the following features:
ECDSA signature generation support - for P256, P384, and P521 curves
ECDSA signature verification support- for P256, P384, and P521 curves
ECC Point multiplication support - for P256, P384, and P521 curves
ECC Key pair generation support - for P256, P384, and P521 curves
ECC P256 sign generation and verification KAT
ECC P384 sign generation and verification KAT
ECC P521 sign generation and verification KAT
ECC P256 pairwise consistency known answer test
ECC P384 pairwise consistency known answer test
ECC P521 pairwise consistency known answer test
